title: Map Explorer Redesign — Self-Contained Phase Prompt Contract
description: Schema for a single agent-ready prompt. A prompt drives ONE track (functional OR visual) of ONE phase and must be executable by an agent with NO memory of prior sessions. Markdown prompt files in prompts/ are the human-facing rendering of this contract; STATE.json mirrors the status fields.

intent.description: One paragraph: the user-visible problem this prompt fixes and the target end state.

sessionBootstrap.description: Ordered files the agent MUST read before acting, so a cold session recovers context. Always begins with ANTI_AMNESIA.md and LEDGER.md.

contextPrimer.description: Embedded architecture facts the agent needs even with zero prior context: how the relevant subsystem works and where its seams are. Self-contained; does not assume PLAN.md was read.

dependsOn.description: Prompt ids that must be 'done' in STATE.json before this runs.

doNotTouch.description: Files/contracts that must NOT be modified or redefined (shared contracts, fixtures, hooks to reuse).

evidencePath.description: Where proof is saved, e.g. evidence/p05-trackA.md or evidence/p05-draw-open.png.

exitNote.description: What the agent must write into the LEDGER session log + STATE.json evidence before exiting.

guardrails.description: Hard constraints carried into every prompt: no Tailwind in centerpanel; reuse gisContracts/gisFixtures/useDraggableMapPanel; no direct localStorage (Zustand persist urban.config.map.*); exactOptionalPropertyTypes; no synthetic-as-real data; do not close the phase until both tracks verified.
